content:
​This is a day of historic significance for the Patna High Court. Your Ladyship, Ms. Justice Meenakshi Madan Rai, has left a lasting legacy in the golden history of this institution by becoming only the second lady Chief Justice of the Patna High Court. Your appointment was not just a milestone for women in the judiciary, but a moment of immense pride for the entire legal fraternity of Bihar.

​Your Ladyship's tenure has been a distinguished tenure for this Court. Beyond the landmark judgments, we will forever cherish the grace, patience, and intellect with which you guided the courtroom. You leave behind a legacy that will inspire generations of legal minds to come.

​From your roots as the first lady judicial officer of Sikkim to the highest seat of justice here in Patna, your journey embodies determination, integrity, and absolute devotion to the rule of law. To the members of the Bar, you were a patient listener; to the younger generation of advocates like myself, you have been a profound source of encouragement and a true pathfinder.

​As you step into a well-deserved retirement, I pray for your good health, happiness, and peace. Thank you, Your Ladyship, for raising the stature of this Court and leaving us with memories we will honor forever.💐

comment: A lasting judicial legacy is measured not only by landmark judgments but also by the courtroom culture a Chief Justice leaves behind, especially in how young lawyers are heard and mentored.
